title: Luscious dense Italian oyster mushrooms Carbonara
description: A rich and creamy Italian dish featuring oyster mushrooms, perfect for a date night, made with sous-vide eggs and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients. This carbonara is a decadent and indulgent treat.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the oyster mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the bowl and toss to combine with the egg mixture.
Add the mushroom and garlic mixture to the bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
